import pytest

def test_happy_path_single_word():
    """Test inserting a single word and searching for it (happy path)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hello")
    assert search("hello") is True

def test_happy_path_multiple_words():
    """Test inserting multiple words and searching for them (happy path)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("cat")
    insert("car")
    insert("dog")
    assert search("cat") is True
    assert search("car") is True
    assert search("dog") is True

def test_edge_case_empty_word():
    """Test inserting and searching an empty word (edge case)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("")
    assert search("") is True

def test_edge_case_empty_trie_search():
    """Test searching in an empty trie (edge case)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    # No inserts
    assert search("") is False
    assert search("a") is False

def test_edge_case_single_letter():
    """Test inserting and searching a single-letter word (edge case)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("a")
    assert search("a") is True
    assert search("") is False

def test_edge_case_duplicate_insert():
    """Test inserting the same word multiple times (edge case)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hello")
    insert("hello")  # Duplicate
    assert search("hello") is True

def test_edge_case_special_characters():
    """Test inserting and searching a word with special characters (edge case)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hello!")
    assert search("hello!") is True
    assert search("hello") is False  # Prefix without end marker

def test_non_existent_word():
    """Test searching for a word that was never inserted (error case simulation)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hello")
    assert search("world") is False

def test_prefix_search():
    """Test searching for a prefix of an inserted word (should return False)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hello")
    assert search("hell") is False  # Prefix
    assert search("he") is False    # Shorter prefix

def test_longer_than_inserted_search():
    """Test searching for a word longer than an inserted prefix (should return False)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("hell")
    assert search("hello") is False  # Extra character

def test_mixed_words_search():
    """Test searching with shared prefixes but different endings (error case for partial matches)."""
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()
    insert("cat")
    insert("car")
    assert search("ca") is False     # Shared prefix
    assert search("cats") is False   # Extension of existing word
    assert search("dog") is True     # Unrelated word
